description: exit_mode=rsi: exit when RSI(2) > 65 instead of SMA cross
exit_mode=both: exit on SMA cross OR RSI recovery (whichever first)
rsi_entry=35: RSI<35 is still below midpoint
sma_exit=3: faster exit, capture quick bounce
rsi_period=2: back to Connors original RSI(2)
rsi_entry=35: slightly tighter entry, better quality
lower rsi_entry: fewer but higher quality trades, target 500 trades
traditional Connors RSI uses 2-period RSI, more sensitive
require 2 down days: more selective, higher quality
rsi exit mode instead of sma: tighter exit
wider stop 2.0x to let trades breathe
